segments.text: Today I want to tell you that eating 50 grams of protein after a workout increases muscle synthesis by 20%.
This is based on a new study from the University of Muscle.
Don't forget to like and subscribe.

fullText: Welcome back to the channel. Today I want to tell you that eating 50 grams of protein after a workout increases muscle synthesis by 20%. This is based on a new study from the University of Muscle. Don't forget to like and subscribe.
